description: Baseline: TSC variant on c5.4xlarge (16 vCPU, 32GB), 133 tests
Experiment 1: Cache pulumi-test-language binary build across variants + OTel tracing instrumentation
Experiment 2: Reduced parallelism to -parallel=4 (SLOWER - 27% regression)
Experiment 3: Increased parallelism to -parallel=16 (no improvement over default)
Experiment 4: npm_config_prefer_offline=true - instance became unresponsive, likely caused issues with local tarball installs
Experiment 5: node_modules + tsc output caching via hardlinks (SLOWER - cache overhead > savings)
Experiment 6: tmpfs (RAM disk) for test temp directories - 44.8% improvement
Experiment 7: tmpfs + parallel=32 (SLOWER - too much parallelism on tmpfs causes OOM/swapping)
Experiment 8: All 3 variants (TSC+TSNode+Bun) in parallel with tmpfs — 607s total vs 578s for TSC alone baseline
Experiment 9: Skip local=true early + npm --no-audit --no-fund — 268s (53.6% improvement from baseline)
Experiment 10: All 3 variants with skip local early + npm --no-audit --no-fund + tmpfs — 551s total
Experiment 11: Skip installDependencies for subsequent shared-source runs — 227s (60.8% from baseline)
Experiment 12: All 3 variants with all optimizations — 531s total (64% improvement from estimated sequential baseline)
Experiment 13: Policy pack install caching — 263s (possible noise, marginal change)
Experiment 14: tsc --skipLibCheck — 192s (66.8% improvement from baseline 578s)
Experiment 15: All 3 variants with all optimizations including --skipLibCheck — 520s total
Experiment 16: npm --no-optional — 181s (68.7% from baseline)
Experiment 17: --ignore-scripts — no improvement (184s vs 181s, within noise)
Experiment 18: --install-strategy=shallow — marginal (179s vs 181s)
Experiment 19: Final 3-variant benchmark — 505s total (66% from baseline)
Experiment 20: Shared PackageCache for PCL binding + npm flags in Pack — 175s (69.7% from baseline)
Experiment 21: --skipLibCheck in SDK Pack build — 139s (75.8% from baseline 578s)
Experiment 22: All 3 variants — 336s (77.2% from sequential baseline)
Experiment 23: --prefer-offline — 193s (regression from 139s, reverted)
Experiment 24: --install-strategy=shallow — 182s (confirmed ~5% over without)
Experiment 25: Confirmed clean 3-variant — 436s (70.5% from sequential baseline)
Experiment 26: Pre-warm npm cache — 154s (73.2% from baseline)
Experiment 27: All 3 variants with cache warming — 329s (77.7% from baseline)
Experiment 28: --skipLibCheck in core SDK Pack — 175s (marginal, core pack only runs once)
Experiment 29: All 3 variants cold cache — 536s (variance from 329s warm)
Experiment 30: Improved cache warming (add typescript + @types/node) — 192s cold
Experiment 31: --legacy-peer-deps — 134s (76.7% from baseline)
Experiment 32: All 3 variants with --legacy-peer-deps — 458s warm cache
Experiment 33: npm cache on tmpfs — 190s (cold tmpfs cache worse than warm disk cache)
Experiment 34: TSC 3-run variance — 183s median (172-191s range), 68.3% from baseline
Experiment 35: Pre-seed node_modules via cp -a — 192s (no improvement, npm re-resolves anyway)
Experiment 36: Pack npm flags (--install-strategy=shallow --legacy-peer-deps) — 215s (high variance from l1-builtin-require-pulumi-version)
Experiment 37: TSC after removing shared PackageCache fix — 199s (65.6% from baseline, correctness fixed)
Experiment 38: Per-test PackageCache (safe, correctness preserved) — 212s
Experiment 39: Back-to-back TSC runs — 184s/201s (avg 192s, 66.7% from baseline)
Experiment 40: GOMAXPROCS=32 parallel=32 — 159s (72.4% from baseline)
Experiment 41: GOMAXPROCS=64 parallel=64 — instance OOM, too much memory pressure
Experiment 42: Final confirmed — TSC 167s warm / 209s cold, all 3: 563s cold. GOMAXPROCS=32
Experiment 43: Final all-3-variant warm GOMAXPROCS=32 — 502s (66% from ~1478s baseline)
Experiment 44: DISABLE_AUTOMATIC_PLUGIN_ACQUISITION — 215s (WORSE, causes plugin errors)
Experiment 45: Stable measurement — 169s/185s avg 177s (69.4% from baseline)
Experiment 46: Final stable measurement — 208s (64% from baseline)
Experiment 47: PULUMI_SKIP_CHECKPOINTS=true — 150s/138s/302s(outlier), avg 144s excl outlier (75.1% from baseline)
Experiment 48: All 3 variants with SKIP_CHECKPOINTS + TRANSPILE_ONLY — 329s (77.7% from baseline)
Experiment 49-51: NODE_OPTIONS, Go -gcflags, DISABLE_JOURNALING — no meaningful improvement beyond SKIP_CHECKPOINTS
Experiment 52: Inline snapshot edits (avoid temp dir copy) — 140s
Experiment 53: All inline snapshot edits — 122s/152s avg 137s (76.2% from baseline)
